layout.structure: Side panel (md:w-96 or md:w-[400px]) for inputs/results + Main area for Mapbox map
layout.spacing_scale: Tailwind spacing, heavy use of p-4 to p-6 for dashboard cards, gap-4 for bento layouts.
layout.border_radius: rounded-none or minimal rounded-md (max 6px) to maintain Swiss technical feel

surfaces.map_overlays: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 (light) or bg-black/60 (dark), with 1px border-white/20
surfaces.cards: Flat solid background, 1px border (border-border), no soft shadows. Sharp and technical.
surfaces.buttons: Solid primary color or outline with 1px border. Hover states should increase contrast.

motion.chart_animations: Smooth drawing effect for energy consumption line/area chart

components.map: Mapbox GL JS with interactive markers and geojson line layer for route
components.trip_input_form: Shadcn UI forms, customized for high contrast. Sharp edges.
components.energy_chart: Recharts AreaChart or LineChart with gradient under line
components.dark_mode_toggle: Minimalist icon toggle, fixed in top right or inside side panel header

empty_state_bg.description: Abstract black and white topographic lines pattern, used as a subtle background pattern for empty states or loading screens.

ev_charging_hero.description: White electric car charging on an urban city street. Use this in onboarding modals, welcome screens or informational cards.

ev_plug.description: Close up of EV plug. Can be used as a thumbnail for charging station suggestions.

accessibility.contrast_ratio: APCA compliant. Text over map must have text-shadow or a solid background wrapper.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g. data-testid='calculate-route-button')

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Mapbox GL JS and Recharts. Set up map components properly.
Create a responsive layout: Mobile is a bottom sheet or stacked over the map, Desktop is a fixed left side-panel with the map filling the rest of the screen.
The default theme should be light, but include a functional theme toggle that switches between Tailwind's dark and light modes.
Ensure map overlays and floating UI use the Crystal Glassmorphism style.
For the energy graph, use an area chart matching the primary brand color.
Alert the user visually (Warning Amber) if the arrival battery percentage drops below 20% in the trip dashboard.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive inputs, buttons, and significant UI markers.
